programme.desc: Using his trademark, powerpoint-comedy and a series of mischievous games, Dave invites Jimmy Carr, Cariad Lloyd and Phill Jupitus to help him make sense of our insensible world

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Trading History
programme.desc: The historical significance of artefacts for sale at auction, beginning with items associated with Queens Victoria and Elizabeth II and the German battleship Bismarck

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: Constructing the Gotthard Base Tunnel in Switzerland, the longest rail tunnel in the world, running for 57 kilometres through the Alps

programme.title: Royal Murder Mysteries
programme.desc: Calls to reinvestigate the suspicious death of King Ludwig of Bavaria in 1886, who died three days after he was declared insane and deposed from the throne

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: British bombers are unable to hit their targets precisely and attack German cities under cover of darkness, while the Blitz in Britain brings public demand for revenge strikes, and Arthur Harris takes charge of Bomber Command

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The Jewish group the Avengers who, as the Second World War was ending, hunted down persecutors known to have contributed to deaths during the Holocaust, including Wilhelm Stuckart

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An Albanian village home to Allied secret agents, devastated for resisting the Nazi war machine, and a notorious asylum in America that enforced lobotomies

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo experiences first-hand Italy's 'need for speed' in a state-of-the-art Maserati sports car, and discovers how the leaning tower of Pisa was rescued from near collapse. In Carrara, he finds out how the marble used by Michelangelo is still being quarried and is invited to chip away at a contemporary sculpture. Moving on to Bologna, the former politician embarks on a doomed search for spaghetti bolognese before being taught how to prepare a tagliatelle al ragu. Finally, he lets the wind rush through his hair on a high-speed boat trip across Lake Garda

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents a second programme from the Somme battlefields, in which she and a small group of experts meet families with stories of courage and humanity in wartime, with various items helping to bring their tales to life. They include the story of a footballer who is said to have kicked a ball to lead an advance into enemy lines, and the account of one of the first nurses to have gone to war - and ended up serving alongside Edith Cavell. A German soldier's grandson reveals all the objects his relative took to the trenches where he lost his life - including a letter to be read in the event of his death - and Fiona tells the story of her great-grandfather, who fought at the Somme

programme.title: The Railway: First Great Western
programme.desc: As the deadline approaches for the reopening of the mainline at Dawlish, a 300-strong army of engineers works 24 hours a day to keep to the timetable. At London's Paddington station, a train with a Pullman silver service dining car is being prepared, with the onboard team pulling out all the stops to impress food writer Regula Ysewijn, who is researching an article. Elsewhere, North Cotswolds station manager Theresa - known as the 'smiling tiger' for the way she runs her stations firmly and with great care and dedication - keeps a watchful eye on the line between Oxford and Hereford, which carries the highest proportion of first-class ticket holders on the network

programme.title: Secrets of Britain
programme.desc: The series examining some of the UK's landmarks continues, with a look at the history of subterranean London, uncovering Roman remains, plague pits and secret bunkers under the capital's streets

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Investigating what happened to a pirate city in Jamaica, a grim gulag in Croatia and a Louisiana plantation caught up in the aftermath of the American Civil War

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: A look at how British-trained Czechs were behind the assassination of Reinhard Heydrich, one of the main architects of the Holocaust

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Churchill's plan to attack Germany through Italy. Although considered the simplest military solution, the Allies were to face formidable opposition, while the Americans met the Wehrmacht for the first time. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on a Greek odyssey from the Athens port of Piraeus, north to the city of Thessaloniki, exploring the Acropolis and sampling moussaka and baklava on the way. He also discovers the parlous state of Greek finances at the time of his 1913 Continental Railway Guide, and learns how an aristocratic English poet became a Greek national hero

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An impressive compound commandeered and repurposed by a brutal regime and an eerie complex off the coast of Ireland that became the biggest of its kind

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Vintage comedy from Messrs Barker and Corbett, including the Job Interview, the Soho Cinema, and a musical interlude with Jehosophat and Jones

programme.title: The Two Ronnies

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville struggles to find some privacy when the milkwoman makes a pass at him. Nurse Gladys Emmanuel steps in by persuading Arkwright to take her to a hotel

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright decides to open the shop before dawn to catch the morning rush and tries a special promotion to get rid of some of the goods, including fig biscuits and toilet rolls

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright is reluctant to buy a new suit until Nurse Gladys Emmanuel persuades him to. He agrees, but only if I can be made in the same style as his old one. Roy Clarke's classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker, David Jason and Lynda Baron

programme.desc: The spacecraft designed for the first manned mission to Mars, planned to launch by 2035, which requires the most powerful rocket ever built and a specially designed crew module

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Tredegar House near Newport in Wales, where members of the public bring along treasured antiques and collectibles. Items of interest include a tapestry woven in tribute to Status Quo, a carved coconut steeped in 18th-century maritime history and a frog-shaped brooch. A former Mastermind champion shows off the glass vase he won, and a Second World War veteran tells the story of a daring mission to inspect German defences before the D-Day landings - and how he came to have a packet of cigarettes from Field Marshal Rommel

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: Documentary following the exploits of a family-run crew of heavy-haulage specialists as they transport the heaviest, longest and most precious locomotives around the world. Terry and Jason have been called in to move legendary steam locomotive Britannia. The 68-year-old vehicle has undergone a major restoration in Crewe and is scheduled to start running at the Severn Valley Railway

programme.title: Secrets of Britain
programme.desc: Exploring the history of Westminster Abbey, which dates back to the 11th century and houses more than 500 corpses, including those of Edward I, Elizabeth I, Charles Darwin and Isaac Newton, as well as staging 16 royal weddings. The episode also explores the Houses of Parliament and Big Ben

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Examining a ghost island once belonging to a secretive country on the fringes of Europe. Also, a haunting site in the UK with evidence of strange burial practices

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: How Second World War criminal Adolf Eichmann was tracked down to Buenos Aires, Argentina, in 1961

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The longest retreat in British military history, when Allied troops defending Burma in 1942 were confronted by Japanese forces well prepared for jungle warfare. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo ventures deep into the Black Forest, where he discovers how Hansel and Gretel helped to unify the German nation. A masterclass in carving cuckoo clocks demonstrates how the nation's reputation for quality and reliability in manufacturing was established. Later, at Goettingen University, the former politician discovers two sides of student life at the turn of the 20th century - the duelling fraternities and the ground-breaking scientists who laid the foundation of Germany's world-class transport technology

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Special access to Salem's most mysterious sites reveals the secret history of the mass hysteria and lurid trials that led to the executions of 20 innocent people

A man brings in his collection of original cut-throat razors, and reveals how he still regularly uses them, and a Lone Ranger fanatic shares his vast collection of TV, radio and comics celebrating the fictional hero of America's Wild West

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice Roberts explores Plymouth's history during the Elizabethan era, visiting the home of the city's most famous son, Sir Francis Drake, and uncovering his history of piracy and slave trading - all carried out with approval from the Queen. She also discovers the revolutionary shipbuilding techniques that helped defeat the Spanish Armada, while aerial archaeologist Ben Robinson highlights the physical characteristics that made Plymouth Harbour such an attractive base for pirates

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau

They have visions of turning it into a bathroom for their 40-foot boat on the moat, complete with all eco-friendly mod cons. And it's not long before the whole family get to work clearing the overgrown site so the project can begin

programme.title: Page Three: The Naked Truth
programme.desc: This year marks the 50th anniversary since the first appearance of the Sun's page three girl. Here, in this look back at uniquely British institution, some of the most famous models tell their stories. Samantha Fox, Jilly Johnson, Maria Whittaker and Keeley Hazell describe the highs and lows of their profession, Rhian Sugden and Emma reveal the misery that came with tabloid scandal and Hannah Claydon talks about the countdown to her debut at the age of 16

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes a professional dancer from London who is seeking a man to lose his virginity with - and who can keep up with him on the dance floor. The second of this episode's contestants is a rugby player who has been out of the dating game for a while and is shy around women, but hopes that seeing a potential date naked will give him a confidence boost

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A look back at the showbiz singletons who bravely embarked on blind dates with unsuspecting members of the public, including Alexandra Burke's date with professional model Louis, and Esther Rantzen's rendezvous with Irish defence lawyer John. The programme also looks back at the dates of DJ Roman Kemp, Conservative MP Michael Fabricant and former Gogglebox star Sandra Martin

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Christmas at Chatsworth House
programme.desc: One-off documentary going behind the scenes of Chatsworth, one of England's most impressive stately homes, as the Duke, Duchess and their 800 staff brace themselves for an influx of 200,000 visitors over the 2019 festive season. Christmas is the most important event for the Derbyshire estate and crucial to its survival. In just five days, the house is transformed with 30 Christmas trees, 60,000 baubles, and a million fairy lights. But this year Derbyshire has been crippled by unprecedented flooding. Can family and staff rally to make this a season to be remembered?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former pub landlady Zoe Condon hosts the first dinner party in Ipswich, hoping her plan to use only the best local ingredients will win her the £1,000 prize money. She makes her guests take part in a computer game tournament, but the entertainment receives a mixed response

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the second day of the competition in Ipswich, a series of mishaps and slip-ups leaves a hung-over Barry Davis short of ingredients as he prepares a three-course meal for his fellow diners. Resorting to an old family recipe fails to help the hapless host, and tension between two of the guests threatens to derail the evening

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Matron Angie Robertson holds the third party in Ipswich, featuring a menu inspired by her favourite musicals, but tensions are running high following her fall-out with Zoe at the previous night's meal. The host also plans to sing to her guests between courses - something Barry Davis is dreading

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Waitress Lisa Quinton hosts the fourth dinner party in Ipswich, seeking advice from her cafe's head chef on creating an Italian main course - even though he is Egyptian. After enduring tense evenings with Zoe and Angie, keen clubber Lisa decides to lighten the mood with a series of party tricks, and later tries to heal the rift by getting everyone on the dance floor

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Butcher Gerard King hosts the final meal in Ipswich, serving up meat from his own shop in a bid to win the £1,000 prize money. However, he has to contend with a sore head and struggles to pull the menu together at the last minute. He hopes to turn it around when his guests arrive, despite the week's previous quarrels

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Keen runners Richard and Eileen love sunny Cyprus so much they've been coming back for 15 years and have even booked their places on the island's annual half marathon. All they need now is their very own holiday home in their favourite town of Oroklini, where they can also entertain their 13 children and grandchildren. Ben Hillman offers his expert help, lining up five options for the pair to consider

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps house hunters find their dream homes in popular winter sun destinations. Potential buyers explore the beautiful Sarasota Keys in Florida

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The Crown Inn in Grewelthorpe, North Yorkshire, where owners Debbie Heartfield and Paul Dixon hope to impress their guests

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Wendy and Marcus aim to finish their newly renovated wedding barn for a VIP visit from the local mayor. In the Ardèche, chateau owners Amy and Marc have big plans to turn two of their outbuildings into a yoga studio and café to kick-start their fledgling business of running a restorative retreat centre. Meanwhile, Belinda and Lee's hopes of giving their donjon a much-needed facelift start to fade as a concrete delivery fails to work upon arrival

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy's parents draw attention to Robert's strange eating habits, making him feel self-conscious every time he sits down for a meal - so Debra devises a plan to cure him once and for all. Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Brad Garrett star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: An invitation to spend Easter with the Barones spurs the MacDougalls to unite with the family over a 500-piece jigsaw puzzle - until Ray and Pat upset the apple cart by indulging in more than their fair share of bonding. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save - Handlebar, Casa Roma and the Black Pearl - to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies is house-hunting in the foothills of the Sierra Nevada mountain range with keen adventurer Mark, who wants to relocate to the Spanish countryside

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Mother-of-three Selina and her sister Reena look for a holiday home in Mijas Costa on the Costa del Sol within a budget of £100,000 that has a garden and a sea or mountain view

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: Best Bits
programme.desc: The first of two highlights programmes celebrating 10 years of the culinary contest. Featuring some of the most unusual, confusing and innuendo-laden cakes to grace the tent. The programme also revisits some of the most popular contestants from past series, including Norman, Flo and Kim-Joy

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Daisy May Cooper, Johnny Vegas, Katherine Parkinson, Mawaan Rizwan and Richard Herring take on a number of ludicrous challenges, hoping to walk away with their reputations intact. Mawaan is not at all fazed when faced with a task involving office chairs, chickens and remote control cars, although the same cannot be said of his rivals. Daisy tries to decipher mysterious messages from Richard, and Katherine is baffled by a giant marble

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes a professional dancer from London who is seeking a man to lose his virginity with - and who can keep up with him on the dance floor. The second of this episode's contestants is a rugby player who has been out of the dating game for a while and is shy around women, but hopes that seeing a potential date naked will give him a confidence boost

programme.title: A Very Royal Christmas: Sandringham Secrets
programme.desc: A look at how the royal family celebrate Christmas Day at the Queen's country estate in Norfolk, combining archive footage with interviews from royal insiders and former staff. They discuss the garish gifts, classy celebrations and historical traditions, as well as why Monopoly has been banned from royal Christmases for more than a decade

programme.title: Christmas at Chatsworth House
programme.desc: One-off documentary going behind the scenes of Chatsworth, one of England's most impressive stately homes, as the Duke, Duchess and their 800 staff brace themselves for an influx of 200,000 visitors over the 2019 festive season. Christmas is the most important event for the Derbyshire estate and crucial to its survival. In just five days, the house is transformed with 30 Christmas trees, 60,000 baubles, and a million fairy lights. But this year Derbyshire has been crippled by unprecedented flooding. Can family and staff rally to make this a season to be remembered?

programme.title: Jamie's Italian Christmas
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver draws inspiration from the snowy Alps of north Italy to help create his most delicious Christmas Day yet. In a cosy log cabin, accompanied by his mentor Gennaro Contaldo, the host cooks up an epic meal for the big day, taking turkey and trimmings and giving it extra sparkle with an Italian twist

programme.title: The Truth About Amazon
programme.desc: Sabrina Grant and Helen Skelton investigate how the online retailer's dominant position in the marketplace and wealth of consumer information forces other companies to adapt their retail strategy to keep up. The programme also reveals how Amazon is rapidly replacing Google as the biggest gateway to the Internet and examines the company's plans to enter the grocery trade

programme.title: Heston's Feasts
programme.desc: DJ Jo Whiley, former model Jo Wood and musician Noddy Holder join Heston Blumenthal for a meal that reflects the memories of his 1970s childhood, beginning with savoury-flavoured ice lollies and DIY noodles. Next up is an inventive twist on the school-dinner staple of spam fritters, lumpy mash and cabbage, followed by an unusual dessert

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Christmas
programme.desc: The creative host has every size, shape and style of Christmas tree covered - from minis to whoppers

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Chartered surveyor Dave Wheeler throws the first dinner party in Manchester, but gets off to a bad start when the guests announce they dislike the first course. He tries to lighten the mood with a series of pranks, but fails to impress optometrist Shaida Shipping, and resorts to a Mick Jagger impression in a final attempt to dazzle his diners

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: At the second dinner party in Manchester, drama teacher Matthew Nichols plans his meal of Cheshire tart and lamb as if it were a military operation. However, it takes more than pinpoint precision in the kitchen to erase memories of Dave Wheeler's lively bash from his guests' minds

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Self-confessed celebrity-stalker Jane Bates hosts the third dinner party in Manchester, planning to bring a touch of Hollywood glamour to the suburb of Burnage. The theme is reflected in her menu, with dishes inspired by some of her favourite stars, including Johnny Depp and Dean Martin

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Optometrist Shaida Shipping hosts the fourth dinner party in Manchester, offering a spicy menu featuring a roly-poly meat loaf and a main course inspired by her Tanzanian roots. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Chris Brady hosts the final meal in Manchester, planning to make his own pasta and provide entertainment involving an eating game and a gorilla suit. programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Postal workers Linda and Andy from Leicestershire are hanging up their mailbags to relocate to the sun-kissed coast of western Cyprus. Jonnie Irwin has five options lined up for their £120,000 budget, but will any have the couple ready to put in an offer?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Peter and Julia Andrews from Hull love Fuerteventura in the Canary Islands and want to buy a holiday home there, which their whole family can enjoy. Armed with a budget of £60,000, Sara Damergi scours the island for five perfect lock-up-and-leave properties, but will any of them make the grade?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final venue is Stix Glamping in Greetham, Rutland, where one guest decides glamping is not for her before she has even set foot on site, leaving her partner all alone

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is upset to hear Debra has been discussing intimate details of their marriage with her gossipy friends - and responds by revealing a few secrets of his own. Guest starring Maggie Wheeler (Friends)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is elated to be signed up by a modelling agency, convinced fame and wealth are just around the corner - but his dreams of success prove short-lived. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to family owned Italian restaurant Giuseppi's in Macomb Township, Michigan. Father and son Joe and Sam Borgia's constant fighting is driving customers away, and Gordon discovers one of the restaurateurs is concealing a serious health problem. Nevertheless, he sets about rescuing them from disaster and turning around the failing business

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay goes back to two restaurants - Giuseppi's and Sante La Brea - to check in with the owners he helped in the past and find out whether his advice has been put to good use. Will he be pleased with their progress? Plus, an update on Finn McCool's from season one

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton meets hospital worker Sharon, who is searching for a holiday home in Torrevieja on Spain's Costa Blanca with a budget of £50,000

programme.desc: Following Sarah Beeny and her family as they relocate from London to Somerset, renovating a semi-derelict former dairy farm into their dream family home

programme.desc: Sabrina Grant and Helen Skelton investigate how the online retailer's dominant position in the marketplace and wealth of consumer information forces other companies to adapt their retail strategy to keep up. programme.desc: A look at how the royal family celebrate Christmas Day at the Queen's country estate in Norfolk, combining archive footage with interviews from royal insiders and former staff. programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Revisiting a series of previous dates where sparks flew on their first meeting, including 21-year-old dancer Frankie who was set up on a date with fellow dancer Muhala, and the pair were thrilled to be matched with someone who shared similar passions. programme.title: Surviving Covid
programme.desc: An intimate, feature-length documentary following the stories of four patients at London's King's College Hospital who have been struck down by Covid-19. The film follows the patients and their families over a six-month period, offering a stark reminder of how frightening and destructive the Covid-19 virus can be

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retired pair Retired Dawn and Les from Basingstoke want to relocate to sunny south-east Cyprus, where they're looking for a townhouse or bungalow that all four generations of their family can enjoy. The couple used to be leaders in the Scouts and the Brownies, so Jonnie Irwin has to work hard to earn his house hunting badge, as he comes up with five properties for their £100,000 budget

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel Strawbridge turn their attentions to the wash house - a shell of an old stone building on the far side of the moat. And it's not long before the whole family get to work clearing the overgrown site so the project can begin

programme.title: Will & Grace

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie cannot understand why women have suddenly started rejecting his advances - until he discovers someone has set up a website dedicated to exposing him as a low-life Lothario. Determined to find out who's responsible, he begins contacting his former partners

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A retired couple in a seaside village in Norfolk battle with their non-paying tenant living in the flat above them, so they ask eviction expert Paul to help. Blackpool lettings agent John comes up against a hard drug user who is attracting antisocial wrongdoers to the bedsits that John runs, while in Leicestershire, Sharon battles to reclaim a property from a former friend who is close to £3,500 in arrears with rent

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Letting agent Paul uncovers a cannabis farm during a routine arrears inspection, but learns that the tenant has been in prison for the past four months and claims ignorance of the criminal crop. Meanwhile, builders Stuart and Steve win a possession order to regain their property, but face the worst damage they have ever seen and a £20,000 bill to repair it

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary series giving an insight into the world of debt collection. Kevin Stokes and Brian O'Shaughnessy try to collect a debt from a technology company, but with the director nowhere to be seen, the office manager does everything she can to prove the business is no longer trading. Stewart McCracken and Elmor Victor face a heartbreaking house repossession in Merseyside, where two landlords are forced to evict a tenant recovering from a brain tumour which has cost him his job and income

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Kevin Stokes and Brian O'Shaughnessy get into a doorstep confrontation with a debtor who wants to prove her family business is bankrupt. However, when tempers flare Brian is assaulted and the agents call the police. Elsewhere, Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner face evicting people from three properties owned by the same landlord in north London, and Brian and Delroy Anglin collect £2,000 debt owed to a vet in Kent

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner get caught up in a dispute between a landlord and a tenant who refuses to move out, and Brian O'Shaughnessy and Delroy Anglin chase a £17,000 debt. In Essex, a couple owe their neighbour £11,000, and on the south coast, debt collection from a Turkish restaurant gets complicated when there is confusion about ownership

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In east London, High Court Enforcement Agents Paul and Phil are involved in a brothel eviction, while in south Wales, Stewart and Elmore chase a debt owed by a working mum. Another case sees Stewart and Victor hunting down a £3,000 debt owed by a Liverpool takeaway for rent arrears

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A drink-driver is involved in a crash, a van full of criminals loses control in a high-speed pursuit, and the police helicopter is involved in a lengthy manhunt. Officers also deal with trouble on the streets of Derbyshire, and pursue a motorist who thinks he can outrun the law

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A runaway suspect puts Gary's life in danger, Scott and Adam discover a huge stash of drugs in the boot of a car, and officers are called to a New Year's Eve pub brawl. Plus, Ady catches a car thief, and five police vehicles are involved in a motorway chase

programme.title: Police Interceptors

A CCTV operator's instincts lead him to keep an eye on a man acting suspiciously on a train station platform and who then takes a knife out of his pocket and threatens a woman coming towards him. There is also footage of a raid on a west London jewellery shop, with the gang spraying bleach in the eyes of security guards and smashing down the doors with pickaxes while the terrified staff cower inside

Sci-fi drama, based on Alan Moore and Dave Gibbons' graphic novel, starring Patrick Wilson, Jackie Earle Haley, Malin Akerman and Billy Crudup

programme.title: Police Interceptors

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will runs into an old boyfriend at the gym, and Grace asks Karen for a loan to expand her business into the office next door. Meanwhile, Jack tries to popularise his new catchphrase by incessantly repeating it. Eric McCormack and Debra Messing star

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Evelyn tries to undermine Jake's confidence by playing down his recent academic achievements. When Alan tries to cut her out of their lives, she resorts to emotional blackmail to regain their attention

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan starts to worry about a medical procedure he is facing, so Charlie persuades him a trip to Las Vegas would take his mind off the operation. However, things take a turn for the worse and they end up staying at home

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine the experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. Posters aimed at naming and shaming one of the residents of Withycombe, Somerset, for taking part in a government-backed badger cull result in him and his family being driven out by animal rights activists. In Woodford Green, north-east London, an ambitious house extension results in all light being blocked to one neighbouring property and huge cracks appearing in the other, while a Bournemouth woman ends up having a restraining order taken out against her after erecting a gated driveway before receiving official approval

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Another selection of residential feuds, featuring Barnsley pensioners Barry and Phyllis Roddis's dispute with a neighbour who was scrapping cars in his driveway, which led to him waging a nine-year campaign of intimidation against them. Plus, in Streatham, south London, Richard and Philomena Chadwick have been battling for five years to evict squatters whose bongo-playing parties and rooftop sunbathing have invaded the privacy of their once secluded garden

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul Bohill and Phil Short must deal with a negligent tenant who fled upon their arrival, forcing the agents to set a trap in order to evict him. Brian O'Shaughnessy and Kevin Stokes chase a debt of £5,000 in Kent, before heading to Surrey to recover £11,000 owed by the owner a bespoke furniture business. Plus, Paul and Steve Pinner's patience is tested to the limit when they are sent to carry out an eviction in London

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Delroy and Kevin face a web of deceit in an Italian delicatessen in south London as they chase a huge debt amounting to £29,000. Meanwhile, Steve and Paul must evict a tenant in north London who has not paid her rent for over 18 months, before heading to Cambridgeshire to make one of their most emotional evictions to date. Plus, Brian and Delroy track down a pensioner in Surrey who owes £15,000 for a business he bought four years ago

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The enforcement agents try to mediate a dispute in a takeaway, and deal with rent evaders living in potentially deadly conditions. Plus, a businessman faces financial ruin

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The debt collection agents grapple with emotional evictions and moral dilemmas during the festive period, including a young family in Crystal Palace who are made homeless when the landlord repossesses their home because he wants to redevelop the property. The eviction comes as a shock to the family as they are up to date with their rent, but have just one hour to gather their belongings. Plus, an acrimonious divorce in Chessington comes to a head when the estranged wife obtains a writ to reclaim the house, and an off-licence owner in Hampshire with unpaid rent of more than £5,000 battles to keep his business open just as everything shuts down for the holidays

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Jason heads to a Christmas party that has turned into a full-blown riot, while Adam and Nick catch a drunken woman giving her daughter a lift to the shops. Plus, Kev is seconds away from disaster when he places himself in the path of danger to prevent a car from becoming a fireball

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Ross and John put their armed-response training to the test when they tackle a suspected gunman, while teams are called out to deal with the results of dangerous driving after a person parks on a roundabout and a pedestrian is crushed under a car. Elsewhere, officers raid a cannabis farm, a Reliant Robin is bid a fiery farewell, and Phil finds out what happens when the driver of a Subaru Impreza decides to take on an HGV

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Duggie and Mark show that they are as quick on their feet as they are behind the wheel when a serial offender tries to give them the runaround. A high-speed pursuit comes to a painful finish, PC Dan Myerscough loses patience with a silver-tongued drunk, and officers Martin and Hayley are called out to a 4x4 that has come a cropper due to treacherous ice

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Internet entrepreneur Martin and his partner in grime Glenn hear about a huge fly-tipping operation blighting a remote Hampshire beauty spot, and raise a small army of volunteers who roll up their sleeves to sort it themselves. Meanwhile, the UK's network of motorways and A-roads rely upon a system of lay-bys to help keep drivers safe, but these safe pull-in zones also attract an unsightly collection of filthy behaviour, and it falls to Huntingdon lay-by warriors Clive and Steve to take on the speeding traffic, atrocious weather, drunk drivers - and those people who confuse lay-bys with lavatories

programme.title: Robbing Your Relatives
programme.desc: Families are supposed to protect and love one another, but family fraud is on the increase, with millions of pounds being stolen from victims by their own flesh and blood. This second in a two-part documentary features several such cases

programme.title: Jackie Chan's The Forbidden Kingdom (2008)
programme.desc: An American teenager obsessed with kung fu movies is sent back in time to ancient China, where he joins the battle to free the imprisoned Monkey King. The only problem is he has no martial arts skills of his own, and will need the assistance of two legendary warriors to become the hero he needs to be. Martial arts adventure, starring Jet Li and Jackie Chan

programme.title: The Detail
programme.desc: The detectives investigate when a burned corpse is found, and their only leads are a dog collar found round his neck and the fact he had a limp. Drama, starring Angela Griffin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A carjacking turns nasty when an off-duty police officer is killed and the driver is kidnapped. Luckily, Briscoe and Curtis capture one of the perpetrators, who offers to reveal the whereabouts of the missing driver to DA Ross - in exchange for immunity on the cop-killing charge. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives probe the shooting of a motorist, and arrest a man who helped the victim change a tyre on his car shortly before he was killed. The suspect protests his innocence, and points the investigators in the direction of another man who admits to the crime and even signs a confession, but further inquiries cast doubt on his guilt. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the death of a book editor who was reputedly having an affair with one of her authors, and find themselves focusing on the lover's long-time companion, whose alibi turns out to be a tissue of lies. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy faces bad memories when a drunk driver kills three people - and finds himself forced to protect the perpetrator in the process. Award-winning police drama, starring Benjamin Bratt and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Ross investigate when a restaurant becomes the scene of a shooting, and discover one of the diners is concealing a desire for revenge. Unfortunately, the object of their suspicion has a clever defence already up her sleeve - and only an expert witness can break her story. Sam Waterston and Carey Lowell star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A charity worker with a secret appetite for sordid encounters dies at the hands of a serial killer, but the defendant constructs a unique case by claiming the crime was the result of exposure to excessive violence on television. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Carey Lowell

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An explosion at an apartment building brings navy officer Terence Keith to the team's attention and it transpires he had been on medication for anxiety, a condition that had led to him being ejected from a pilot's training course. Ducky's profile of Keith suggests that he may be unstable and about to exact revenge for having his dream of becoming a fighter ace taken away from him, and evidence points to him intending to carry out a suicide attack

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A woman is found murdered and Gibbs and McGee are called in when she is discovered to be carrying ID bearing the name Sgt Patricia Moreno, a US marine known to have died several years earlier. The victim is discovered to have come to America from Afghanistan and a necklace reveals a fingerprint that leads the team to a known assassin. Guest starring Lolita Davidovich

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gibbs continues to blame himself for Kate's death, and enlists Jenny's help to track down Ari - but they are nearly killed in a shoot-out. Just when all seems lost, however, Ziva is able to point the investigation in the right direction. Starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a decorated petty officer, whose body was found in a sports arena. The victim was discovered clutching a rifle, and it seems he had been engaged in a fire-fight, but when the agents fire the weapon, they discover it is a tranquilliser gun. A chain of evidence leads the investigators to a past kidnapping case involving another petty officer, who was last seen in Mexico. Meanwhile, Tammy Gregorio officially joins the team, as Pride seeks a way to get the FBI off his back

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A psychiatrist is found murdered, leading Goren and Eames to suspect an ophthalmologist may be involved, especially when they realise that his research into schizophrenia could be masking mental health problems of his own. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A socialite's body is found in Central Park, and detectives Benson and Stabler initially suspect her wealthy boyfriend of murder. However, the investigation reveals the victim has been living a double life, posing as a homeless teenager - and the team discovers a street family loyal to its sinister leader. Starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Lake team up with FBI agent Lauren Cooper to track down a serial killer who has claimed the lives of more than 20 women - but discover that he too has been murdered. The investigation leads them to a warehouse where they find a hidden torture chamber containing a surviving victim - but she later dies, shutting down a vital line of inquiry and complicating the case still further

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When an infant goes missing, detectives take sides in the family's right-to-die court case and Barba's interference in the case puts the whole DA's office in jeopardy. Drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A doctor, arrested for sexually abusing his patients, is set free after Cassidy's testimony causes a mistrial. Lorenzo Scott and Dean Winters guest star

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Jo discover the body of a department store manager in a shop window when they apprehend a pickpocket. They suspect the thief of murder, but his excuse leads them to the victim's assistant, who appears to have planned the crime. However, they unearth evidence that her dead boss had been accused of sexual harassment and had wounds on his body indicating that he might also have been an assailant. Drama, starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A person dressed in a clown costume murders a bakery owner. The evidence leads to a man from Flack's past who reluctantly agreed to join the witness protection programme to testify against drug dealers. Crime drama, starring Eddie Cahill

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate when a male nurse is found beaten to within an inch of his life - but as they draw closer to their prime suspects, the shocking motives for the attack become clear. Gritty police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis come up against the Mob when a Mafia gangster-turned-FBI witness is found dead, and the investigation is hampered when the only lead fails to leave any evidence. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The fatal stabbing of a psychologist draws Briscoe and Curtis into a heated divorce case and pits McCoy and Ross against a manipulative attorney who puts results before professional ethics. Award-winning American police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team investigate when naval cryptanalyst Andrew Wells is shot dead in a park outside Baltimore. At the scene, Tony spots a man who was one of his informants from 15 years earlier when he was a police officer, but who went into hiding after a bid to bring down the Russian mobsters he worked for went wrong. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team works with Abigail Borin of the Coast Guard Investigative Service after a highly suspicious explosion and fire on board an oil rig kills a US marine corps reservist. Abby detects malware in the platform's computer systems, while Ducky finds traces on the victim's body that lead to a lawyer who works for the oil company. Back in the office, a prankster is bringing some light relief and although the likeliest suspect is Tony, he denies any involvement. Crime drama, guest starring Diane Neal

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents set out to find the stolen body of a Civil War general, but Dr Elaine Burns is shocked to discover the entombed corpse of a Marine sergeant instead, eventually reaching the conclusion he was buried alive. Meanwhile, Mossad agent Ziva David returns as a replacement for Kate, much to Gibbs's displeasure. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine who appears to have been leading a double life is shot dead. As the investigation continues, however, the team uncovers a case of identity theft - together with a tangled motive involving a mysterious package and a wronged wife. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the seemingly random murders of several homeless people, uncovering a fraud involving a crooked insurance agent. But when he is found dead, with no sign of the stolen money, the detectives must call on all their experience to catch the killer. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan, with Lance Reddick (The Wire)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A number of fertilised embryos are stolen from a sperm bank and the team's investigation reveals several unhappy customers - as well as a couple of outspoken anti-fertility activists who liken such clinics to death camps. Before long, Benson and Stabler have their suspects in custody - but a shocking turn of events at the courthouse turns the case into a murder. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson goes undercover in a prison to investigate a teenage girl's claims that a guard raped her and has been threatening her jailed mother. Posing as an inmate, she tries to find evidence that systematic abuse is taking place - and faces a terrifying ordeal in the basement of the facility. Starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Carisi opens a police investigation when his niece reports a classmate for sexual assault, and Stone learns there are no perfect witnesses when it comes to sex crimes

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A girl's death becomes a criminal case when a surgeon harvests her organs without parental consent. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Jo investigate the death of a Spanish club promoter and are surprised to find a police officer from Barcelona at the crime scene. They realise that, for diplomatic reasons, he is allowed to be there - until Mac discovers he is withholding information about the case. As the investigation proceeds, however, the New York detectives begin to suspect they are dealing with something other than a straightforward homicide. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The investigators find three bodies when they arrive at the scene of an accident involving a truck full of revellers, and find a lead when one of the dead is identified as the daughter of an unpopular trade-union boss. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise, Carmine Giovinazzo and Hill Harper

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: Voight and the intelligence unit run a joint investigation with the FBI after a deadly bomb explodes during an annual street festival. However, the case turns personal for Burgess when she discovers that an officer she trained has become a prime suspect

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Investigations into a stolen credit card lead Briscoe and Curtis to a pair of teenage lovers who may have killed their newborn son and disposed of the body. The couple strenuously deny any wrongdoing - but the discovery of a decomposing baby's finger adds weight to the evidence against them. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy tries to prosecute a pilot accused of murdering her married lover for trying to end their relationship, but finds himself battling the Navy and the office of the Judge Advocate General, who seem intent on obstructing his efforts. Acclaimed American detective drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate a seemingly random drive-by shooting, but soon suspect the victim's husband may know more than he is letting on. To make matters worse, the hospital in which the victim was pronounced dead appears to have contributed to her demise - putting a highly respected surgeon's reputation on the line. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate when a student is shot dead after a party gets out of control. The victim's boyfriend is arrested, but the officers later receive a tip-off about someone else - a vengeful youth deliberately infecting girls with HIV. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate an attack on a nurse, and discover she had been moving house regularly in an effort to evade a stalker who terrorised her with distressing e-mails. The victim regains consciousness, but fails to identify her attacker, leading to the shocking revelation that she may have fabricated the assault story as a way of attracting attention

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the disappearance of a wealthy couple seemingly snatched from their apartment building, but suspicion eventually falls on a man suffering from mental illness - presenting Ross with a tough ethical decision. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach, Benjamin Bratt and Carey Lowell

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is forced to take a step back from work when his increasingly frail father Jackson begs him to help track down an old friend from the Second World War who does not have long left to live. Meanwhile, the rest of the team investigate the death of a marine sergeant who appears to have been caught in the crossfire during a bungled robbery, but Tony and Tim find evidence the victim may have been targeted. Crime drama, guest starring Ralph Waite (The Waltons), with Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Petty officer Jody Ray is killed by a hit-and-run driver and evidence points to staff sergeant Justin Dunne, whose guilt seems certain when DiNozzo and McGee find him washing a bloodstained knife when they go to arrest him. However, Dunne tells his lawyer Carrie Clark he was miles away in Falls Church at the time - stabbing bookmaker Donny Sullivan to death. Unable to reveal the truth to the NCIS team, Clark decides to check out the alibi herself. Crime drama, guest starring Salli Richardson-Whitfield (A Town Called Eureka)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The agents are called in to review unorthodox training exercises after a Navy Seal candidate is killed weeks before his graduation. Meanwhile, LaSalle tries to avoid an old flame

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: A sailor from Mississippi, who also happens to be a biker, is murdered. When the agents investigate, they begin to suspect the death might be the result of a resurgent rivalry between two biker gangs, and Percy goes undercover to locate an old informant and find out more. Meanwhile, Gregorio suggests LaSalle have a heart-to-heart with Pride

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The investigation into a promising new author's death leads to a decades-old secret kept between two reclusive brothers. Judd Hirsch guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Benson are assigned the case of a taxi driver found stabbed to death, and it soon emerges that the victim had a selection of false identities, leading the cops on a wild goose chase before they uncover any concrete leads. First episode of the spin-off drama, starring Mariska Hargitay, Christopher Meloni and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The officers are called in to investigate when a successful newspaper columnist falls six storeys to her death, dressed only in her underwear. It soon emerges her psychiatrist had visited the apartment that day for dinner, but he seems reluctant to tell the police what went on, making them believe he could be hiding vital clues. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A soldier is suspected of sexual assault, but the team's investigation is disrupted by military red tape

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigates a series of shootings at a nightclub, where a bartender and two patrons were killed by a hitman, who then proceeded to kidnap someone. Hawes is stunned when the abducted woman is revealed to be Camille Jordanson, a childhood friend who has become embroiled in a messy counterfeit pill scheme and seems to have made a few enemies in the criminal underworld. Guest starring singer Ne-Yo

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A serial rapist is murdered and his body is left bound and gagged in the same fashion as the women he attacked. Suspecting the killer may be one of the criminal's former victims, Mac and the team are left with mixed feelings about bringing the culprit to justice. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore a house in Stoke-on-Trent, a plot of land in west London and a cottage in North Yorkshire. They discover who bought them at auction, before catching up with the buyers when the renovation work has been completed

programme.desc: Alistair Appleton helps an American expat couple with a generous £1million budget to search for a home in Surrey. Away from the house hunt, the presenter finds out about the county's motor racing history, and goes out on a track in a 1929 Bentley

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The team heads to an auction in Co Durham on the second leg of their journey, where Philip Serrell develops an interest in sewing and a wedding dress catches Anita Manning's eye

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Sarah Moore visits Wallyford Recycling Centre in Scotland. Rupert Blanchard works on wooden garden chairs, while Bruce Faulseit turns a sewing machine stand into something special

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Recently retired couple Nick and Jane Purser are looking forward to settling down, but cannot decide where that should be. Jane's mother lives in Liverpool, so she would prefer to stay close by with a move to Lancaster. Nick wants them to move to southern France, where he can ride his motorbike in the sun. Jasmine Harman shows the pair three properties in Lancaster for up to £180,000 and Jonnie Irwin tempts them with three properties for up to £145,000 in France

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: A pregnant mare is rescued and the animal welfare officers find themselves in danger when they encounter a pack of fierce fighting dogs

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: The officers are faced with the difficult task of freeing a puppy trapped under a house as the temperature soars in Texas

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: It takes a court warrant and police back-up before a group of horses can be removed from its owner, and a litter of Rottweiler puppies is rescued

programme.title: Animal Cops Miami
programme.desc: Investigators resolve to get justice for a neglected dog and its puppy, and agent Casadevall helps members of the canine population suffering in the Miami heat

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Jay Blades visits Altrincham in search of three unwanted items. Ollie Allen takes on some metal springs, while upholsterer Leigh-Anne Treadwell gets to work on an old blanket box

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Ghost Adventures

programme.title: Most Haunted

But which of the stars will make the most money at auction in Nottingham?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: When her partner of 20 years died, Ginny Lunn decided to find a holiday home where she could create new memories. Torn between buying a place in Dorset within easy reach of her London home for a budget of £250,000, and the Costa Tropical in Spain, where she would have a budget of £150,000, she requires help. Jasmine Harman shows her three options in Dorset, and Laura Hamilton tries to impress her with three properties in Spain, but, with the help of her sister Sara, which one will Ginny choose?

programme.desc: Gilby and the other children steal the drakkar - but the young captain knows nothing about navigation and soon gets hopelessly lost at sea

programme.desc: A phoney sorcerer visits the village, and Vic is determined to uncover the truth behind his apparent magical powers

programme.desc: The tales of Zot, a good-hearted, fun-loving but rather bouncy dog and his best pal, Clive

programme.title: Zot the Dog
programme.desc: The tales of Zot, a good-hearted, fun-loving but rather bouncy dog and his best pal, Clive

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: A magic carpet sends Jack and Tashi back to prehistoric times. When they return, they discover they have changed history so monkeys now rule the world

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: Jack buys a pair of magic shoes that will help him win a dance contest. However, he finds that once they start dancing, they cannot stop

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: Nils finds a map in a bottle on a Scandinavian island which shows the hiding place of Ulrik the Green's treasure

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: Akka decides to make Nils, Martin and Gorgo take an exam on general goose knowledge

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Series featuring inspirational walks between from around Britain. Andrew White walks on a disused railway in the Peak District and alongside the Caledonian Canal

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: Insight into the daily lives of the troopers of the Household Cavalry, the British Army's most senior regiments. The horsemen practice for the state opening of Parliament - an exercise that takes place during the dead of night. New recruits learn to ride the hard way at Windsor, and the armoured division gets into a fire fight with the Paras

programme.title: Prime Suspect: Jack the Ripper
programme.desc: Investigating whether DNA tests can prove that notorious 19th-century serial killer Jack the Ripper was Australian convict Frederick Bailey Deeming

programme.title: Once a Soldier
programme.desc: Open for over 300 years and home to 320 old soldiers, the Royal Hospital in Chelsea is under threat. This series follows the residents for a year of their lives

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sisters Sharon and Tracey's lives are changed for ever when their husbands leave for work and never return. First episode of the popular comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: Henry VIII's Enforcer: The Rise and Fall of Thomas Cromwell
programme.desc: Lawyer and statesman Thomas Cromwell served as chief minister to Henry VIII from 1532 to 1540 and has gone down in history as one of the most corrupt and manipulative people ever to hold power in England. In this documentary Diarmaid MacCulloch reveals another side to the man, arguing that Cromwell was a principled idealist and revolutionary whose radical evangelism laid the foundations for the modern British state

programme.title: Kind Hearts and Coronets (1949)
programme.desc: The penniless grandson of a duke plots to eliminate the eight relatives standing between him and a vast inheritance. He shoots, drowns, poisons and explodes his way through his family tree, but his final triumph is ruined when his lady love's husband kills himself. Ealing black comedy, starring Alec Guinness as all eight potential victims, with Dennis Price, Valerie Hobson and Joan Greenwood

programme.title: The Big Money (1956)
programme.desc: An incompetent thief finally manages to make his family of crooks proud of him by pulling off a major robbery, but finds his ill-gotten gains bring him anything but happiness. Comedy, starring Ian Carmichael, Belinda Lee, Kathleen Harrison and Robert Helpmann

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: Insight into the daily lives of the troopers of the Household Cavalry, the British Army's most senior regiments. The horsemen practice for the state opening of Parliament - an exercise that takes place during the dead of night. New recruits learn to ride the hard way at Windsor, and the armoured division gets into a fire fight with the Paras

programme.title: Earth Cycle
programme.desc: Simon Parker charts the seasonal cycles of the natural world as he journeys through Scandinavia on a bicycle, wild camping, seeing animal migrations and sampling local food

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Medical journalist Michael Mosley and a team of doctors offer advice on health, using their expertise and the latest research to investigate the truth behind various claims being made in the media. Surgeon Gabriel Weston takes part in an experiment at the University of Surrey's Sleep Research Centre to discover whether an extra hour in bed could have major benefits, while A&E specialist Dr Saleyha Ahsan asks if people can be overweight and still healthy, and tests the accuracy of two different methods used to assess fatness

programme.title: Henry VIII: Mind of a Tyrant
programme.desc: Dr David Starkey examines how the Tudor monarch forged a fiercely independent England whose coastal defences and naval power created a new sense of national destiny. He also explores the death of Jane Seymour and her replacement in the monarch's affections by Katherine Howard, whose adultery made her another victim of court intrigue

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook
programme.desc: The Paris-based chef returns to her home city to see what its most interesting eateries have to offer. In the first edition, she visits a pop-up restaurant in a boutique

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: The sisters face up to the realities of life with their husbands in prison, and try to explain things to Tracey's son, Garth. Classic comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: The Prosecution of Julian Assange
programme.desc: The events that led to the prosecution of one of the most influential figures to emerge this century, who is lauded and dismissed as hero and villain

programme.title: Chubby Funny (2016)
programme.desc: An aspiring actor continually blames others for his failure to become a big star. He decides to give himself a year living in London to finally land his big break - but the personal crises that have dogged him all his life are not going away. Comedy drama, directed by and starring Harry Michell, with Augustus Prew and Jeff Rawle

programme.title: The Escort (2015)
programme.desc: A sex-obsessed journalist whose career is falling apart has a chance encounter in a bar with a high-class prostitute. Seeing a chance to write the story that will make him a success, he persuades her to let him document her life, and a strange connection develops between the two lonely outsiders. Comedy drama, starring Michael Doneger, Lyndsy Fonseca and Bruce Campbell

programme.title: My Saviour (2019)
programme.desc: A woman whose life is in disarray is attacked by a local gang, only for a mysterious stranger to come to her rescue. She forms an intense relationship with her rescuer, but their close bond sends her on a disturbing journey into a nightmarish world of violence and abuse. Drama, starring Bayley Freer and Steven Murphy

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: Insight into the daily lives of the troopers of the Household Cavalry, the British Army's most senior regiments. The horsemen practice for the state opening of Parliament - an exercise that takes place during the dead of night. New recruits learn to ride the hard way at Windsor, and the armoured division gets into a fire fight with the Paras

programme.title: Supersonic Saucer (1956)
programme.desc: A group of children help protect a stranded alien from criminals who want to exploit his strange powers. Sci-fi adventure, starring Marcia Manolescue and Gillian Harrison

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Snorre, Tjure and Vic are kidnapped by Sven, but cause confusion for their captors with a little ventriloquism

programme.title: Vic the Viking

programme.desc: Observational documentary revealing the inner workings of the central London thoroughfare, following police and paramedics as they work to keep the public safe. In the first episode, a shopper is badly injured in a fall on a Tube escalator, and cameras accompany service teams into the district's sewers

programme.title: Hot Enough for June (1964)
programme.desc: An unemployed writer gets a job for an industrialist and is sent on a business trip to Prague. However, he does not realise his boss is actually in the British Secret Service and is using him to unwittingly carry out an important mission - while his local chauffeur is really a Communist agent. Spy comedy, starring Dirk Bogarde, Sylva Koscina, Robert Morley, Leo McKern and John Le Mesurier

programme.title: Gaiety George (1948)
programme.desc: An Irish music hall impresario comes to London to seek his fortune, and makes it big by buying a rundown theatre and transforming it into a major attraction. Drama based on the life of impresario George Edwardes, starring Richard Greene, Ann Todd, Hazel Court, Charles Victor and Peter Graves

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: The Princess Elizabeth Cup sees troopers compete to be the smartest in the Household Cavalry. Recruits seeking promotion attend gruelling tests involving live rounds and grenades, and the trainee horse-riders attempt their first canter

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook
programme.desc: The Paris-based chef returns to her home city to see what its most interesting eateries have to offer. In the first edition, she visits a pop-up restaurant in a boutique

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Michael Mosley and the team are in Chester to learn about an experiment to find out whether standing up a few more hours each day could have major health benefits. Gabriel Weston witnesses a womb transplant, Saleyha Ahsan shows how to stop someone choking and Chris van Tulleken finds out if vitamin supplements are important to wellbeing

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: First-ever episode of the comedy. Gary and Dermot worry about who will moving into the newly vacant flat above them, but their fears prove unfounded when it turns out to be an attractive blonde

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot and Gary get serious over a chess contest in which the victor gains an evening of pleasure. Laddish comedy, starring Martin Clunes and Leslie Ash

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: Landmark series from the 1970s, telling the story of swing. Featuring archive footage and contributions from Frank Sinatra, Bing Crosby, Benny Goodman and Woody Herman

programme.title: The Crouches
programme.desc: Natalie begins to feel bored in her marriage, a situation not helped by the arrival of a dishy new reverend who offers her a little more than spiritual guidance. Can Roly possibly compete with a man who has God on his side? Robbie Gee and Jo Martin star in the comedy, with Rudolph Walker, Danny John-Jules and Don Warrington

programme.title: A Moody Christmas
programme.desc: Dan shows off his new girlfriend to the family and Sean plans to pop the question to Peggy, but a surprise visit from jailbird Uncle Rhys is the biggest shock of all. Australian comedy, starring Ian Meadows

programme.title: London Live Film Festival
programme.desc: A selection of the best short films from the Portobello Film Festival

programme.title: Fingersmith
programme.desc: As Maud's wedding day approaches, Sue struggles to hide both her love for her mistress and her guilt over Rivers' plan to send his new wife to an asylum once they are married, but cannot stop the scheme from going ahead. When the ceremony is over, a shocking turn of events puts her in a terrifying situation that she could never have foreseen. Drama, starring Sally Hawkins, Rupert Evans, Elaine Cassidy and Imelda Staunton

programme.title: Relentless (2020)
programme.desc: An ex-convict must stay out of trouble for one more day to secure his freedom - but must choose between his principles and his future when he comes to the aid of a prostitute under threat from a gang. Action thriller, starring Steven Murphy and Tiffany-Ellen Robinson

programme.title: Content Content
programme.desc: Sitcom based in the offices of Content Content, a digital content agency that nobody, including the employees, can pronounce correctly

programme.desc: Series featuring inspirational walks between from around Britain. Andrew White walks on a disused railway in the Peak District and alongside the Caledonian Canal

programme.desc: Halvar tries to make a seagull land on his head as a sign of his rightful leadership - but it keeps landing on Gorm instead

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar discovers a cave where Sven has hidden all his loot - and finds that all the words spoken there have become frozen in the ice

programme.title: Zot the Dog
programme.desc: The tales of Zot, a good-hearted, fun-loving but rather bouncy dog and his best pal, Clive

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: BabaYaga offers to magically turn Jack into a great singer - but the spell goes wrong and he ends up swapping voices with a pig

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: The Warlord puts Jack and Tashi in charge of the town for one day, because he knows it is about to come under attack

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: Gorgo and Akka isolated far from the flock and witness an aurora borealis

programme.title: Nils Holgersson

programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo
